theme_and_archetype.vibe: Authentic Indian heritage, trustworthy, organic, modern but grounded.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-bold text-primary font-serif

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous touch targets for mobile staff views; organized dense bento grids for admin dashboard.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4331] text-white hover:bg-[#245A42] transition-colors shadow-sm rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium flex items-center justify-center
buttons.accent: bg-[#F28C28] text-white hover:bg-[#D97B20] transition-colors shadow-sm rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1A4331] text-[#1A4331] hover:bg-[#F3F5F1] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-[#D8E0D9] shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.traceability_stage: bg-white border-l-4 border-[#4C8A53] shadow-sm rounded-r-2xl rounded-l-sm p-5 mb-4 relative

forms.input: w-full border border-[#D8E0D9] rounded-lg p-3 text-[#121F17] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4C8A53] focus:border-transparent outline-none bg-white
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#56675B] mb-1.5

data_display.status_badge: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-[#F3F5F1] text-[#1A4331] uppercase tracking-wide
data_display.timeline_connector: absolute left-[1.125rem] top-8 bottom-[-2rem] w-0.5 bg-[#D8E0D9]

admin_dashboard.layout: Grid-based bento layout. 1 col mobile, 3-4 cols desktop.
admin_dashboard.features: Top stat cards (Total Batches, Revenue), main chart area for volume over time, recent batches list.
admin_dashboard.filters: Pill-style toggles for Week/Month/Year at the top right.

staff_mobile_app.layout: Bottom heavy for reachability. Large FAB for 'Scan QR'.
staff_mobile_app.ui_elements: High contrast typography. Hidden price/financial info. Focus purely on operational data entry.
staff_mobile_app.scanner: Full-screen camera viewport with a semi-transparent dark overlay and clear central cutout.

public_traceability.hero: Rich green header with elegant Cormorant Garamond typography. Image of pure seeds or oil. Trust badges (100% Natural, Cold Pressed).
public_traceability.timeline: Vertical progression showing: 1) Sourced Farm/Seed, 2) Extraction via Wooden Ghani, 3) Packaging. Use Indian motifs (subtle mandala watermark).
public_traceability.footer: Authenticity guarantee, contact info, brand story.

qr_print_template.layout: Print-optimized CSS (@media print). White background, crisp black QR code, 'Simply Bhartiya' logo header, Batch ID text below.

logo.description: Simply Bhartiya Logo. CRITICAL: Do NOT use the rounded rectangle border. If possible, use CSS mask or clip-path to feature only the core peacock and text.

hero_backgrounds.description: Macro shot of mixed mustard seeds. Great for procurement stage header or public page hero background (darkened with an overlay).
Textured mustard seeds, warm tones. Suitable for decorative cards or authenticity proof on traceability page.

visual_enhancers.indian_motifs: Use CSS-based subtle repeating geometric patterns or SVG path decorations in headers and footers with very low opacity (5%).
visual_enhancers.borders: Instead of plain borders, consider using a double thin-line border (1px solid + 1px dashed inside) for premium Indian heritage feel on key cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS as a mobile-first PWA. All javascript should be in .js/.jsx, not typescript.
Strictly follow the color palette provided, avoiding ANY use of purple, violet, or unrelated gradients.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for elegant headings (especially on public pages) and 'Outfit' or 'Work Sans' for dense dashboards/mobile forms.
Implement Shadcn UI components for complex interfaces but manually override colors and spacing classes to match these guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use browser-compatible JS/CSS for mobile QR scanning implementation (e.g., html5-qrcode library or similar).
For the printable QR code feature, create a dedicated route or hidden print div that strips out UI elements and shows only the logo, QR code, and batch text via @media print CSS rules.
